# BrandMultiplier.ai

BrandMultiplier.ai installs Narrative Operating Systems for 
founder-led B2B companies between $3M–$50M ARR. We extract what 
makes the founder close deals and codify it into systems the sales 
team can deploy without the founder in the room.

## Core Service
- Narrative Operating System (NOS): a 75-day engagement that 
  extracts, codifies, and deploys the founder's sales narrative 
  across the entire sales team
- Deliverables: Narrative Snapshot, Strategic Sales Narrative Deck,
  Voice Profile, Team Fluency Certification, Daily Optimization 
  Dashboard
- Pricing tiers: Foundation ($7.5K/month), 
  Signature ($12.5–15K/month), Transformation ($20–25K/month)

## Proven Results
- 30%+ average CAC reduction within 6 months
- 35%+ deal cycle acceleration
- 75% client retention beyond initial engagement
- 120+ founder-led B2B companies transformed
- Methodology proven at Accenture: 54% to 88% win rate, $1B+ new 
  revenue in 12 months

## Key Concepts
- Founder-led sales: when the founder is still the primary closer 
  despite having a sales team
- Narrative infrastructure: codified systems that make the 
  founder's story executable by any team member
- Voice Fidelity Gates: quality checkpoints ensuring all content 
  sounds like the founder
- Team Fluency Certification: sales team passes an articulation 
  test before the engagement ends

## Pages
- Homepage: https://www.brandmultiplier.ai/
